description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nRecovers Health of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신의 턴마다 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 만큼 회복합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使自身生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。
